case_title: NG JEROME M. VS PENG MEI WAH

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT PENG MEI WAH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT NG JEROME M. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23203, RECORD TRANSFERRED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO PLAINTIFF NG JEROME M.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PENG MEI WAH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NG JEROME M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PENG MEI WAH $4,773.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,788.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT PENG MEI WAH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NG JEROME M. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PENG MEI WAH PLTFF. TO PAY DEFEND. $38.00 COST. JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 23203 ON 8-16-94. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,773.00 FILED BY NG JEROME M. AS TO DEFENDANT PENG MEI WAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-01-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT PENG MEI WAH RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT NG JEROME M. $38.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $38.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $867.22 FILED BY PENG MEI WAH AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT NG JEROME M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-01-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
